trends.headline: 'Cloud skin' is replacing glass skin as SkinTok's softest filter-free finish
trends.body: Creators are swapping high-shine glass skin for 'cloud skin' — a soft-focus, blurred matte-glow makeup look that mimics a digital filter in real life. Shoot it as a step-by-step 'glass skin vs. cloud skin' split-screen or a 'no-filter, this is just product' close-up reveal.

metadata.context: Soft-focus makeup finish replacing the high-shine glass skin look

trends.headline: Spicule 'micro-needle' serums are SkinTok's most-discussed texture fix
trends.body: Serums packed with marine-sponge spicules create tiny micro-channels in the skin (cue the signature tingle) and creators are filming first-time reaction tests for pores and texture. Easy angle: a 'why my face is tingling' POV plus a 7-day texture diary with macro close-ups.

metadata.context: Innovative exfoliating serum driving first-reaction content

trends.headline: 'Coastal cowgirl' goes harder for summer — denim over swimsuits, hats on the beach
trends.body: The coastal cowgirl mashup (denim, leather, wide-brim hats, linen in sandy beige and ocean blue) is evolving with creators layering oversized western shirts over swimsuits. Perfect for a 'one hat, three beach-to-bar looks' transition reel.

metadata.context: Evolving summer aesthetic blending western and beach styling

trends.headline: #Blokette mixes sporty and girly — pleated skirts with baseball caps and sneakers
trends.body: Blokette (blokecore + coquette) pairs sportswear, collegiate jackets and baseball caps with pleated skirts, ballet flats and mini bags. Great for a 'styling one pleated skirt five ways' or a 'tomboy meets coquette' get-ready-with-me.

trends.headline: Yogurt tiramisu is FoodTok's high-protein dessert of the moment
trends.body: A lighter tiramisu built from yogurt, Lotus Biscoff cookies and coffee is going viral as the 'healthy-ish' dessert creators can't stop layering. Shoot the satisfying layer-by-layer build in a clear glass, or a 'high-protein tiramisu, no mascarpone' recipe reveal.

metadata.context: Lighter twist on a classic dessert trending for protein content

trends.headline: 'Savory-maxxing' is taking over the FYP — pickles and salty plates beat sweet treats
trends.body: FoodTok is anti-sweet right now: pickled-everything, salty snack plates, goat cheese and pickle-topped chips are the new craving content. Easy reaction format: 'I replaced my dessert with a savory plate for a week' or a 'pickle taste-test ranking.'

metadata.context: Anti-sweet flavor shift dominating food content

trends.headline: The 'treadmill strut' is FitTok's playlist-powered cardio challenge
trends.body: The treadmill strut has runners curating a playlist and bumping speed by 0.1mph with every song change — a built-in, filmable progression. Shoot it as a 'one playlist, one workout' POV with the speed counter on screen, or a duet 'can you finish the playlist?' callout.

metadata.context: Music-driven cardio challenge with duet potential

trends.headline: 'Dopamine decor' brings radioactive brights back to HomeTok
trends.body: Mood-boosting, eye-popping color is the antidote to beige minimalism — saturated walls, bold accessories and playful clashing palettes. Film a 'beige room to dopamine room' before/after or a 'shopping my house for color' styling reel.

metadata.context: Bright, mood-boosting interior aesthetic replacing minimalism

trends.headline: The foldable 3-in-1 magnetic charger is the summer travel gadget creators keep demoing
trends.body: A wallet-sized folding charger juices an iPhone, Apple Watch and AirPods at once over Qi2/MagSafe — perfect 'no more three bricks on the nightstand' content. Review-friendly: a hotel-nightstand demo, a 'what's in my travel tech kit,' or a charge-speed test.

metadata.context: Compact travel charger trending in tech-review content

trends.headline: The OXO Tot grape cutter is ParentTok's choking-hazard hack of the week
trends.body: A one-press cutter that quarters grapes, hot dogs and other choking hazards is a viral parent must-have for the satisfying, safety-first payoff. Film a fast 'snack-prep in 30 seconds' demo or a 'baby-safe lunchbox' speed-run.

metadata.context: Safety-focused feeding gadget with quick-demo format

trends.headline: 'CatPOV' cameras are PetTok's most-viewed new format
trends.body: Tiny collar-mounted cameras that capture a cat's-eye-view of the day are racking up tens of millions of views per clip. Easy angle: a 'a day in the life of my cat (filmed by my cat)' edit or a 'what does she do all day?' reveal.

metadata.context: First-person pet-camera format driving big view counts

trends.headline: The 3-in-1 dog water bottle is PetTok's clever on-the-go buy
trends.body: A travel dog bottle combining a water dispenser, treat compartment and poop-bag scraper is gaining traction for walks and road trips. Film a 'testing the all-in-one walk gadget' review or a 'what's clipped to my dog leash' rundown.

metadata.context: Multi-function pet product for on-the-go owners

trends.headline: 'Greece or Turkey?' comparison videos are TravelTok's comment-bait format
trends.body: Head-to-head 'is X or Y better for summer?' destination debates are racking up shares as viewers argue it out in the comments. Shoot a fast split-screen comparing beaches, food and price, ending with 'which would you pick?' to fuel replies.

metadata.context: Comparison-debate format engineered for comments and shares

trends.headline: Bracelet stacking is JewelryTok's summer 'arm candy' obsession
trends.body: Ring stacks have graduated to the wrist — layered beaded bracelets, metal bangles and mixed metals piled into curated-chaos 'arm candy.' Film a 'building my summer stack, each piece has a story' POV or a coastal/mermaid-core beaded stack styling reel.

metadata.context: Layered, mixed-metal bracelet stacking trend for summer
